task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Junior Sales Access' profile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a profile named 'Junior Sales Access' in a list of profiles, a profile creation form, or a success message indicating it was created.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct module permissions are set for the 'Junior Sales Access' profile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the profile settings/permissions matrix for 'Junior Sales Access', the checkboxes or toggles for 'Invoice', 'Sales Order', and 'Purchase Order' must be unchecked/disabled. The checkboxes for 'Contacts', 'Organizations', 'Leads', and 'Opportunities' must be checked/enabled.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Junior Sales Rep' role and its placement under 'Sales Person'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a role named 'Junior Sales Rep' in a roles list or hierarchy tree. It must be visually represented as a child or subordinate to the 'Sales Person' role (e.g., indented under it or connected by a tree line).

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Junior Sales Access' profile is assigned to the 'Junior Sales Rep' role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the role settings or details for 'Junior Sales Rep', the assigned profile or privileges field should display 'Junior Sales Access'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the user Sarah Mitchell with the correct personal details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a user profile, user list, or creation form showing First Name: 'Sarah', Last Name: 'Mitchell', Username: 'sarah.mitchell', and Email: 'sarah.mitchell@greenfield-dist.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify the user is assigned the correct role and admin access is disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the user settings for Sarah Mitchell, the Role field must be set to 'Junior Sales Rep', and any 'Admin Access', 'Is Admin', or 'Administrator' checkbox/toggle must be unchecked or explicitly marked as disabled.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the application's graphical user interface to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a CRM, ERP, or similar business application interface with menus, forms, and buttons, rather than a terminal window executing database commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Check for actual system confirmation of the created entities.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for saved records in list views, success toast notifications (e.g., 'User saved successfully'), or populated hierarchy trees, rather than just unsubmitted forms.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not fake the output using a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text and configurations must appear within the styled UI components of the application, not typed out in Notepad, a generic text editor, or a markdown preview.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The following exact values must be used: Profile Name: 'Junior Sales Access'; Role Name: 'Junior Sales Rep'; Parent Role: 'Sales Person'; Username: 'sarah.mitchell'; First Name: 'Sarah'; Last Name: 'Mitchell'; Email: 'sarah.mitchell@greenfield-dist.com'. Permissions to disable: 'Invoice', 'Sales Order', 'Purchase Order'. Permissions to enable: 'Contacts', 'Organizations', 'Leads', 'Opportunities'. Admin Access must be disabled.
